english translation text: Dua Mujeer

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

“So We heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish
Thus We save believers.”

arabic text: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍوَآلِهِ اَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text: Blessings of Allah be on our chief, Muhammad and his Household, one and all.
(All) praise be to Allah the Lord of the worlds.
Sufficient for us is Allah. He is the Best Protector.

arabic text: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
english translation text: There is no power and no might except (with) Allah, the High, the Great.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
